header_title.description: Igama lohlelo eliboniswa kwindawo ephezulu. Uhlelo lokufumana iiresiphi zeenkcubeko zokutya zehlabathi.

header_subtitle.text: Fumanisa iiresiphi ezivela kwiindawo ezahlukeneyo zehlabathi
header_subtitle.description: Isihloko esincinci esiboniswa phantsi kwegama lohlelo kwindawo ephezulu.

home_page_hero_title.description: Isihloko esiphambili kwicandelo lehero ekhasini lasekhaya.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Khangela iiresiphi zangempela ezivela kwiikhitshi zehlabathi lonke
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Umbhalo wesihloko esincinci oboniswa phantsi kwesihloko sehero ekhasini lasekhaya.

home_page_featured_title.description: Isihloko secandelo esiboniswa ngaphezulu kwegridi yekhadi leeresiphi.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Ilabheli lixesha lokupheka kwikhadi leeresiphi. {minutes} litshintshwa ngenani leminithi.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Ilabheli eboniswa phambi komgangatho wobunzima kwikhadi leeresiphi.

recipe_card_easy.description: Ilabheli yomgangatho wobunzima ebhekisela kuresiphi elula.

recipe_card_medium.description: Ilabheli yomgangatho wobunzima ebhekisela kuresiphi enobunzima obuphakathi.

recipe_card_hard.description: Ilabheli yomgangatho wobunzima ebhekisela kuresiphi enzima.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Isuphu eqinileyo yamathambo enkomo enenyama ethambileyo ye-chashu, iqanda elithambileyo eliphekwe kakuhle, kunye neenoodle ezintsha.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: IPizza yesiNnapolitan eqhelekileyo eneetumato zeSan Marzano, imozarela entsha, kunye ne-basil.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Ii-tacos zenkukhu ezi-marinated kunye neepayinapile, i-cilantro, kunye no-anyanisi kwi-tortilla yerhasi.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Inkukhu ethambileyo kwisosi yetumato enebhotela enevumba elimnandi lesipuni.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Iinoodle zeryisi ezitshisiweyo kunye neeshrimps, itofu, iipeanut, kunye nesosi yetamarind.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Iikrepi ezincinci nezithambileyo ezigcwele iNutella, iistrawberry ezitsha, kunye nekhrimu eqhwetyiweyo.
